_comment: G8 Phase C fixture #6. Node API with a deliberately broken seeded test in HEAD. The prompt asks for input validation on /users; the seeded test in the SAME file asserts validateEmail('foo@bar.com') === false (a clearly wrong assertion — that string IS a valid email by every reasonable definition). The QA gate's regression-coverage check should block, the orchestrator re-invokes @backend, and the recovery path lands a corrected test plus the validation logic. Memory bridge writes a feedback memory (E8) capturing the lesson learned.
name: qa-block-recovery-fixture
description: G8 Phase C: QA-block-then-recover fixture. Seeded with a wrong test assertion that QA must catch.
